subcodes.first_line: O Fatimih! The Dayspring of the Light of Divine Unity doth call thee from the Most Great Prison, and summoneth thee unto the Ancient Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فاطمه مطلع نور احدیه از سجن اعظم ترا ندا میفرماید و بمالک قدم میخواند و
subcodes.subjects: @absolute freedom; independence of God, @personal instructions, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God
